summary: A talking-head testimonial of Malachi Reid, an inaugural AstraZeneca apprentice, filmed in front of the U.S. Capitol describing the value of hands-on apprenticeship over the traditional model, closing on a DOL 'Apprenticeship USA' end card. Subtitled single-subject interview with no music track or cinematic styling. Out of scope: testimonial, not music-driven spectacle.
notable_text: I am one of the inaugural U.S. [apprentices]; APPRENTICESHIP USA; Department of Labor
